ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monitoring_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring station */,
  "cbsa_code" INTEGER /* CBSA code for the monitoring station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the monitoring station (city, state) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the monitoring station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the monitoring station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the monitoring station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the monitoring station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the station */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the station */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_quality_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each air quality data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station that collected the data */,
  "pollutant_type" TEXT /* Type of air pollutant (e.g., PM2.5, NO2, O3, CO, SO2) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the data was collected */,
  "aqi" INTEGER /* AQI (Air Quality Index) value */,
  "aqi_category" TEXT /* AQI category (e.g., Good, Moderate, Unhealthy for Sensitive Groups, Unhealthy, Very Unhealthy) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., automated sensor, manual monitoring) */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* A flag indicating the quality of the data (e.g., valid, invalid, suspect) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_aqi_category FOREIGN KEY ("aqi_category") REFERENCES aqi_categories ("aqi_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_pollutant_type FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_type") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutants" (
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollutant */,
  "pollutant_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant (e.g., PM2.5, NO2, O3, CO, SO2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pollutant */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the pollutant (e.g., µg/m³, ppb) */,
  "short_description" TEXT /* A short description of the pollutant */,
  "health_impact" TEXT /* Health impact of the pollutant */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Environmental impact of the pollutant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aqi_categories" (
  "aqi_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AQI category */,
  "aqi_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the AQI category (e.g., Good, Moderate, Unhealthy for Sensitive Groups, Unhealthy, Very Unhealthy) */,
  "aqi_min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum AQI value for the category */,
  "aqi_max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum AQI value for the category */,
  "health_advisory" TEXT /* Health advisory for the AQI category */,
  "recommended_actions" TEXT /* Recommended actions for the AQI category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aqi_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality flag */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the air quality data point */,
  "flag_name" TEXT /* Name of the data quality flag (e.g., invalid, missing, suspect) */,
  "flag_description" TEXT /* Description of the data quality flag */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the data quality flag (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_flags_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES air_quality_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the air quality data point */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES air_quality_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_station_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station */,
  "metadata_name" TEXT /* Name of the metadata (e.g., latitude, longitude, elevation) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., geographic, technical) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metadata value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_station_metadata_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aqi_statistics" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AQI statistic */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station */,
  "aqi_stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the AQI statistic (e.g., AQI Maximum, AQI 90th Percentile, AQI Median) */,
  "aqi_stat_value" INTEGER /* Value of the AQI statistic */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the statistic is calculated */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month for which the statistic is calculated */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day for which the statistic is calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aqi_statistics_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutant_concentrations" (
  "concentration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollutant concentration */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the air quality data point */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollutant */,
  "concentration_value" REAL /* Value of the pollutant concentration */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the concentration value (e.g., µg/m³, ppb) */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the concentration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concentration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollutant_concentrations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES air_quality_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollutant_concentrations_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data validation rule */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollutant */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Validation rule for the pollutant (e.g., greater than, less than) */,
  "validation_threshold" REAL /* Validation threshold for the pollutant */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of validation rule (e.g., threshold, range) */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the validation rule was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_rules_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id")
)
